description: Use this API to return the number of data points of a GCAP curve. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.6.1. ierr, count = agcapcount(ibus, id)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Machine bus number. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: count
return_values.description: Number of elements in rarray. (output; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: No error, number of GCAP data points returned.
